docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,459.63 FILED BY REYNOLDS, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT HOMESHARE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF JAMES REYNOLDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOMESHARE INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF REYNOLDS, JAMES
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY REYNOLDS, JAMES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED APR-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOMESHARE INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 06-04-19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYNOLDS, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOMESHARE INC. $2,459.63 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,549.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
